emails.subject: "Ernie" seminars
emails.body: "Ernie" seminars I would like to sign up for the following presentations: (1) Power Marketing Structuring Power Transactions on November 10 and 11 (2) Fundamentals of Corporate Finance on December 2 Please let me know. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: Re: "Ernie" seminars
emails.body: Re: "Ernie" seminars Looks good to me. Taffy: Please put these on the calendar. Sara Shackleton 10/21/99 03:58 PM
